name: read_xdef
short_description: Read Xilinx physical design exchange and restore the physical implementation data to working memory
full_help:
read_xdef

Description: 
Read Xilinx physical design exchange and restore the physical implementation data to working memory

Syntax: 
read_xdef  [-print_release_version] [-no_routing] [-no_clear] [-cell <arg>]
           [-strict] [-no_clear_prog_delay] [-quiet] [-verbose] <file>

Usage: 
  Name                      Description
  -------------------------------------
  [-print_release_version]  Print out the release version of the file
  [-no_routing]             Do not read and restore the routing data
  [-no_clear]               Do not clear the place and route databases before
                            attempting to read in the new xdef data
  [-cell]                   Read the given XDEF in as if it were instantiated
                            under the given cell.
  [-strict]                 Require exact matches between placement and 
                            routing information for the loaded design. Only 
                            valid with -cell.
  [-no_clear_prog_delay]    Don't clear the prog delays when reading in the 
                            xdef.
  [-quiet]                  Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]                Suspend message limits during command execution
  <file>                    XDEF file name

Categories: 
FileIO
